posts.title: Earthquake near Crete
posts.description: A moderate earthquake of magnitude 5.2 was recorded near Crete. No major damages reported.

posts.title: Wildfire in Northern Greece
posts.description: A wildfire has spread across a forested area due to strong winds and high temperatures.

posts.title: Flood warnings issued
posts.description: Heavy rainfall has caused rivers to rise, prompting flood warnings in several regions.

posts.title: Storm approaching Athens
posts.description: Meteorologists warn of an incoming storm with strong winds and possible hail.

posts.title: Aftershocks continue
posts.description: Several aftershocks have been recorded following yesterday's earthquake, causing concern among residents.

posts.title: Fire warnings issued
posts.description: Heavy Fire has caused rivers to rise, prompting flood warnings in several regions.
